headline: 4 Manufacturing Electronics Stocks to Consider on Promising Industry Trends
summary: The Zacks Manufacturing - Electronics industry gains from solid momentum in the manufacturing sector and strength across major end markets. ETN, EMR, ENS and FELE are some notable stocks in the industry.

headline: How Emerson Electric Co.’s (EMR) Wireless Gas Sensor Fits the Connected Process Automation Thesis
summary: Emerson Electric Co. (NYSE:EMR) is one of the best industrial automation stocks to buy now. On June 15, Emerson added combustible gas detection to its core wireless sensor portfolio with the Rosemount 928 wireless gas monitor. The sensor supports percent lower explosive limit monitoring over WirelessHART networks, giving industrial operators another way to detect combustible […]
